alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; direct alignment with RevOps and strategy scope
alignments.job_requirement: Revenue Operations & Strategy Lead title and function

alignments.candidate_evidence: Positioned as Strategy and Operations / Product Operations leader with experience in transformation programs and global commercial operations scaling
alignments.job_requirement: Strategic program leadership and cross-functional stakeholder management (inferred from Lead title)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight-year tenure with two promotions at Google suggests manager or senior manager scope; primary family fit is Revenue Operations at appropriate seniority
alignments.job_requirement: Revenue Operations function at appropriate seniority (L4-L5 equivalent)

gaps.gap: JD explicitly flags forecasting and compensation-modeling as heavy components; candidate background emphasizes commercial operations, transformation, and strategic programs but does not detail forecasting or comp-modeling experience
gaps.mitigation: Forecasting and comp-modeling are learnable technical skills; if candidate has analytical foundation and stakeholder management in a commercial/revenue context, ramp can be managed with onboarding and domain expertise from team

gaps.gap: Location is Sydney; candidate location not specified in profile
gaps.mitigation: Profile notes 'free-visa Sydney is the upside'—if candidate is visa-eligible or willing to relocate, gap is resolved; confirm visa/relocation feasibility before final offer

gaps.gap: JD snapshot is incomplete (fetch_failed: TooManyRedirects); critical details on required compensation knowledge, forecasting depth, systems expertise (Salesforce, Tableau, etc.), and revenue-cycle scope are unknown
gaps.mitigation: Obtain full, current JD to map candidate's forecasting, analytics, and revenue-systems experience against explicit requirements. Low confidence reflects incomplete job context.

output.summary: Revenue Operations is a target fit, and candidate's eight-year Google tenure with strategy and operations leadership suggests L4-L5 scope. However, the JD snapshot is incomplete (fetch failed), and context flags forecasting and compensation-modeling as heavy—areas not detailed in candidate evidence. Confidence is low; obtain full JD and probe forecasting/comp-modeling depth before proceeding.
uncertainties: Full JD text unavailable; critical scope details on forecasting depth, compensation-modeling expectations, and required systems knowledge (Salesforce, Tableau, analytics platforms) are missing
Candidate location and visa status not specified; Sydney location fit is uncertain
Extent of candidate's forecasting and compensation-modeling experience not described in profile
Specific revenue-cycle and GTM ownership scope at Google not detailed; cannot confirm L4-L5 equivalent seniority with precision
